name: Save the Cat Writes a Novel
author: Jessica Brody
description: Novel-specific adaptation of the Save the Cat method.
avoid_if: Your novel is purely stream of consciousness.

references.label: Save the Cat! Writes a Novel

steps.name: Opening Image
steps.prompt: The 'before' snapshot of the hero and their world.

steps.name: Theme Stated
steps.prompt: A hint at what the hero's journey will be about (life lesson).

steps.name: Set-Up
steps.prompt: Establishing the hero's world and their 'stasis death'.

steps.name: Catalyst
steps.prompt: The inciting incident that changes everything.

steps.name: Debate
steps.prompt: Hero's reaction and initial refusal of the call.

steps.name: Break into Two
steps.prompt: The proactive decision to leave the world behind.

steps.name: B Story
steps.prompt: The 'helper' character or subplot is introduced.

steps.name: Fun and Games
steps.prompt: The hero in the 'new world', trying things out.

steps.name: Midpoint
steps.prompt: The stakes are raised; a false victory or false defeat.

steps.name: Bad Guys Close In
steps.prompt: Things get harder; internal and external forces pressure the hero.

steps.name: All Is Lost
steps.prompt: The hero's lowest point; often a 'whiff of death'.

steps.name: Dark Night of the Soul
steps.prompt: The hero wallows and eventually finds the 'new' way.

steps.name: Break into Three
steps.prompt: The hero realizes how to solve the problems from Acts 1 and 2.

steps.name: Finale
steps.prompt: The execution of the new plan and the climax.

steps.name: Final Image
steps.prompt: The 'after' snapshot showing how the hero has changed.
